name: worker-bbs
description: Cloudflare Worker Bulletin Board System (BBS) Template like 4chan

scripts.db:init: wrangler d1 execute BBS_DB --local --file=./schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute BBS_DB --local --file=./seed.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: wrangler d1 execute BBS_DB --remote --file=./schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute BBS_DB --remote --file=./seed.sql
